name: open_app
description: Opens any application on the computer. Use this whenever the user asks to open, launch, or start an app, website, or program.

app_name.description: Exact name of the application, such as WhatsApp, Chrome, or Spotify.

name: weather_report
description: Gets real-time weather information for a city.

name: send_message
description: Sends a text message via WhatsApp, Telegram, or another messaging platform.

platform.description: Platform such as WhatsApp, Telegram, or Instagram.

name: reminder
description: Sets a timed reminder using Windows Task Scheduler.

time.description: Time in HH:MM format using 24-hour time.

name: youtube_video
description: Controls YouTube for playing, summarizing, fetching info, or showing trending videos.

save.description: Save the summary to Notepad for summarize.

region.description: Country code for trending, such as TR or US.

name: screen_process
description: Captures and analyzes the screen or webcam image. Must be called when the user asks what is on screen or camera.

angle.description: screen to capture the display, or camera for webcam.

text.description: Question or instruction about the captured image.

name: computer_settings
description: Controls the computer for single system commands such as volume, brightness, fullscreen, restart, shutdown, WiFi, refresh, zoom, and typing.

action.description: Specific action if known, such as reload_n.

description.description: Natural language description of what to do.

value.description: Optional value such as volume level, text to type, or repeat count.

name: browser_control
description: Controls the web browser for opening sites, searching, clicking, typing, scrolling, and reading page text.

action.description: go_to, search, click, type, scroll, fill_form, smart_click, smart_type, get_text, press, or close.

selector.description: CSS selector for click or type.

description.description: Element description for smart_click or smart_type.

name: file_controller
description: Manages files and folders for listing, creating, deleting, moving, copying, reading, writing, searching, and disk usage.

action.description: list, create_file, create_folder, delete, move, copy, rename, read, write, find, largest, disk_usage, organize_desktop, or info.

path.description: File or folder path, or a shortcut such as desktop, downloads, documents, or home.

destination.description: Destination path for move or copy.

extension.description: File extension to search for, such as .pdf.

name: cmd_control
description: Runs CMD or terminal commands from natural language descriptions for system information and command-line tasks.

task.description: Natural language description of what to do.

visible.description: Open a visible terminal window. Default true.

command.description: Optional exact command if already known.

name: desktop_control
description: Controls desktop-specific actions such as wallpaper, organization, cleanup, listing, and general desktop tasks.

action.description: wallpaper, wallpaper_url, organize, clean, list, stats, or task.

task.description: Natural language description of a desktop task.

name: code_helper
description: Writes, edits, explains, runs, or self-builds code files for coding-related requests.

action.description: write, edit, explain, run, build, or auto.

description.description: What the code should do, or what change to make.

file_path.description: Path to an existing file for edit, explain, run, or build.

args.description: CLI arguments for run or build.

name: dev_agent
description: Builds complete multi-file projects from scratch, installs dependencies, opens VSCode, runs the project, and fixes errors automatically.

name: agent_task
description: Executes complex multi-step tasks that require multiple tools.

goal.description: Complete description of what needs to be accomplished.

name: computer_control
description: Direct computer control for typing, clicking, keyboard shortcuts, scrolling, screenshots, and AI-driven element finding.

action.description: type, smart_type, click, double_click, right_click, hotkey, press, scroll, move, copy, paste, screenshot, wait, clear_field, focus_window, screen_find, screen_click, random_data, or user_data.

x.description: X coordinate for click or move.

y.description: Y coordinate for click or move.

direction.description: Scroll direction: up, down, left, or right.

description.description: Element description for screen_find or screen_click.

name: flight_finder
description: Searches for flights on Google Flights and returns the best options.
